title: SQK-MAP005 protocol for library preparation for Nanopore sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i3c0","text":"This protocol describes the library preparation for Nanopore sequencing according to the SQK-MAP005 protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cg0gj","text":"It accompanies the GigaScience publication:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":19,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4je7p","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"166kj","text":"Benjamin Istace, et al. (2017) De novo assembly and population genomic survey of natural yeast isolates with the Oxford Nanopore MinION sequencer. GigaScience...","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":147,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fragment DNA (2µg for a 8Kb or 6 to 10µg for a 20Kb size) by using Covaris gTube
Perform PreCR treatment (NEB PreCR® Repair Mix) of fragmented DNA
The DNA repair reaction was cleaned up with Agencourt AMPure XP beads (1x)
DNA fragments were End-repaired by using NEBNext® End Repair Module
The end-repair reaction was cleaned up with Agencourt AMPure XP beads (1x)
DNA fragments were dA-tailed by using the NEBNext® dA-Tailing Module
The dA-tail reaction was cleaned up with AMPure beads (1x)
Nanopore adaptors were ligated to the dA-tailed DNA fragment by using NEB Blunt/TA Ligase Master Mix
The ligation reaction was cleaned up with His-Tag Dynabeads (1x)
creator: Gigascience Database
